An official website of the United States government Here's how you know 
Official websites use .gov 
A .gov website belongs to an official government organization in the United States.
Secure .gov websites use HTTPS 
A lock ( ) or https:// means you've safely connected to the .gov website. Share sensitive information only on official, secure websites.

Using CDC.gov 
Frequently Asked Questions 
Print 
Minus 
Related Pages 
How can I subscribe to a CDC News & Updates? 
To receive information from CDC, please enter your email address and select from our list of subscriptions. Then check your inbox for a confirmation email from emailupdates@cdc.gov . Click the link in the email, enter your email address again, and then accept the subscriptions as instructed on the screen. Your email address will only be used to deliver the requested information and to give you access to manage your subscriptions.
How can I manage my subscriptions? 
You can access Manage Your Subscriptions to add or remove subscription topics, browse topics, or change your email address.
Why am I not seeing emails from CDC?
